name: Creole Mustard Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the vinegar, green peppercorns, and shallots in a saucepan over moderately-high heat.
2. Bring to a boil and simmer until reduced to 2 tablespoons.
3. Add the cream and creole mustard; bring to a boil again, then reduce heat and simmer for 2 minutes.
4. In a separate bowl, combine the butter and flour, kneading them into a soft paste.
5. Break the butter mixture into small pieces and whisk into the sauce one at a time, stirring vigorously until thickened without boiling.
6. Strain through a fine chinois.
7. Cover with a layer of melted butter to prevent skin from forming; cover and keep warm by placing over (not in) a water bath.
